top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Newmont’s Red Chris underground expansion gets regulatory green light
top_signals.summary: Approvals pave the way for a transition from open-pit mining to a block caving operation in British Columbia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
